IntroductionWe respect your personal information and your right to privacy. to as Products. By accessing or using our Products you trust us with yourpersonal information. CryptoCompany puts your privacy above all. Please,take a moment to read through this Privacy Policy (further as Policy) tounderstand the way we collect and disclose your Personal Information. Byusing our Products, you give us consent to use your personal informationas described below. If you find any terms of this Policy unacceptable foryou, we ask you to stop using our Products immediately. This Policy

applies to all personal information that we collect through our Productsas well as any related services, sales, marketing, or events. This Policyis regulated by EU General Data Protection Regulation 2016 (GDPR). GDPRrequires that personal information collected from users will be usedtransparently and in accordance with the law. The personal information wecollect is used only for the purposes clearly described in this Policy. Weguarantee that your personal information will be kept secure and only as
long as necessary for the purposes described in this statement.
Definitions"

Personal Information" as used in this Policy means anyinformation relating to a person, for example, you. Personal Informationmay include name, identification number, location data, an onlineidentifier, or any information you share with us.

Personal information collected automaticallyQuick overview: some information – such as your Internet Protocol (IP)address and/or browser and device characteristics – is automaticallycollected when you use our Products.When you visit, use, or navigate the Products we can collect someinformation that is not specific to your identity. preferences, referring URLs, device name, country, location, informationabout who and when you use our Products, and other technical information.This information is primarily needed to maintain the security andoperation of our Products, for our internal analytics and reportingpurposes, and your identification as a user.Similar to many other companies we also collect information throughcookies and similar technologies.The examples of automatically collected information may include thefollowing:

Usage and log information. Usage and log information isnecessary for the proper work of our Products, it includes diagnosticsand performance information and is automatically collected by ourProducts. Depending on your activity in our Products, this usageinformation may include your IP address,

device information, yourbrowser, settings, and information about your interaction with ourProducts (such as the date/time stamps associated with your usage,pages, and files viewed, searches and actions you perform or featuresyou use), device information (such as system activity, error reports(also known as crash dumps) and hardware settings).Device Information. to access our Products. Location Information. Location information isinformation about your device’s location, which can be precise andimprecise. How much information we collect depends on the type ofsettings of the device you use to access the Products. For example, wemay use GPS, IP address, cellular network, or similar technologies tofind out your geolocation that tells us the location of the device youuse to access our Products.

Push Notifications. We may request to send you pushnotifications regarding your account or certain features of our apps. Ifyou wish to opt-out from receiving these types of communications, youmay turn them off in your device's or apps’ settings.

Collecting information about minorsBy our Products, you represent that you are at least 18 or that you arethe parent or guardian of such a minor and consent to such minordependent’s use of our Products. If you think
that we possess Personal Information of people under 18 years of age,please contact us at[email protected].
